title: rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. sacra
intro: Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. sacra is a subspecies of the Rhodiola genus, specifically a perennial plant native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, adaptogenic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for reducing stress and improving mental clarity. The health benefits of Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. sacra include enhanced cognitive function, improved mood, and increased resilience to physical and mental stress, as well as potential anti-anxiety and antidepressant effects. Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. sacra is typically consumed as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, often standardized to contain a specific percentage of rosavin and salidroside, its bioactive compounds.
